title: Intentional Overanalysis II Electric Pikachu
wikitext:
[]: Intentional Overanalysis II: Electric Pikachu Post by NAveryW » Sun Jun 17, 2007 3:19 pm Broken off from the previous Intentional Analysis thread, as it's a different concept, but still complete overanalysis. I present my second intentionally overanalytical thread: INTENTIONAL OVERANALYSIS II: ELECTRIC BOOGALOO , or THE NIPPLES OF FATE Take a look at this scene here. Look very closely at Asuka's breasts. Do you see any nipples? No? Look harder... Still nothing? Even if you do, it's just JPG blur that wasn't there in the original scene. So, we've established that, even in End of Evangelion, where censorship isn't a problem, Asuka's nipples don't show through her plugsuit. And it's not just here, either. Every other time you see Asuka wearing her plugsuit, there are no nipples in sight. UNTIL WE ARRIVE HERE: (Images courtesy of the abandoned commentary) What happened?! Her nipples are suddenly all varicose! Everything in Evangelion has a meaning, and there's no way this was unintentional. What does it generally mean when nipples stick out in such a manner? It's really, really cold. Once again, Anno, master of visual insinuation, has shown us the subtle answer to the inevitable question: "Wouldn't all the calamity in 3I change the Earth's axis like 2I?" And, indeed, it appears it did. A giant Rei of that size tumbling to the Earth would easily knock the Earth off its axis once again, but this time, instead of just tilting the Earth, it has now been knocked further away from the sun into a world of eternal twilight (which is why the sky looks the same when Asuka arrives as it did when Shinji first returned). We can see how cold it must be through the prominence of Asuka's nipples in this final scene. Clearly, it's still not so cold as to be uninhabitable, or cold enough to freeze LCL. But still much colder than it was before. So, you see, the question about 3I affecting the Earth's gravity and rotation was all thought of and explained in "I Need You" through Asuka's nipples.

[]: Re: Intentional Analysis II: Electric Boogaloo Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jun 17, 2007 3:34 pm NAveryW wrote: It's really, really cold.

[]: Post by DatDude » Sun Jun 17, 2007 5:20 pm Somehow I think a thread a bout nipples will not last long.

[]: Post by DatDude » Sun Jun 17, 2007 5:29 pm But back on topic. Acourding to me degree in nipplology those nipples are clearly their do to excitement left over from being turned into tang. I'm giging Shinji 3v1 odds of getting lucky once she wakes up. Now seeing as she is a bit upset with Shinji it might be a bit rough on on old baka.

So, she lay there in lethargic ecstasy, waiting for him to take her once more---this time in reality as opposed to metaphysically--like the crazy son of a bitch he now was! :P And @ first pic: Asuka: "WHEEE! Self-delusion of me piloting ala Regression is ALWAYS FTW! ^__^"

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 18, 2007 6:32 pm And you want intentional overanalysis: (Keep in mind EoTV is pretty much "proto-EoE.") Notice how throughout EoE, mostly in 26', we see Asuka's boobies at some point or another? From EoTV 26, a little while before Shinji rejects Instrumentality, what do we get? NUDE Asuka?! :shock: Condience? I think not!
